creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to jbe from comment #8)

> But not fixing this bug is a security issue
I still doubt that we have to use technical measures to "fix" administrative "issue". It looks for me pretty much the same as the following:
install -m 666 /path/to/file
<do something with it>
cp /path/to/file /path/to/file/copy
<do something else optionally>
chmod 600 /path/to/file

/path/to/file/copy remains 666, contains data from the point it was created ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
